acceptance_criteria.given: the dev subagent has staged the files listed in Evidence (M1 + M2 + M3 output)
acceptance_criteria.when: git log --oneline -3 is run in /dev/shm/dev-workspace/dot-claude and git show HEAD --name-only is inspected
acceptance_criteria.then: the most recent commit message contains '20260524-123039' or 'session wrap-up' and includes docs/dev/completion-20260524-101700.md, docs/dev/dev-report-20260524-101700.json, docs/dev/ticket-20260524-101700.md, and docs/dev/note-20260524-123039-root-bin-manual-commit.md in the changed files list

acceptance_criteria.description: Manual-commit note exists with exact commands
acceptance_criteria.then: the file contains: the exact path /root/bin/happy-session-recovery.sh; the repo root /root; a 'git add /root/bin/happy-session-recovery.sh' command; a 'git commit -m ...' command with a descriptive message; and the three Gap descriptions (tombstone timing, snapshot persistence, MemoryMax defaults) copied from docs/dev/close-report-20260524-101700.md
the file records: 'No /tmp/claude-workflow-* file found for session c216ded5-b7e1-4432-b79f-a6a2042971fe as of 2026-05-24 — /close todo state is resolved'
